sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_punycode (id Int32, encoded_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, tryPunycodeDecode(encoded_string) AS decoded_string FROM test_punycode;
UPDATE test_punycode SET encoded_string = 'xn--c2b' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tryPunycodeDecode(encoded_string) AS decoded_string FROM test_punycode WHERE encoded_string LIKE 'xn--%';
